summary: Iteration 33 - Complete multilingual system testing. All features working correctly: Language switcher visible and functional, menu translations work in real-time (FR→HT), all dashboard labels translated, ticket print includes succursale name, only open lotteries shown on Nouvelle Vente page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual system fully functional. Language switcher works on vendeur dashboard (visible in sidebar at bottom). All 4 languages (FR, HT, EN, ES) have complete translations. Ticket print includes succursale name. Only open lotteries shown on Nouvelle Vente page.

language_switcher_visibility.details: Language switcher visible in sidebar (bottom) and header (desktop). 3 instances found, 2 visible on desktop.

language_change_fr_to_ht.details: Successfully changed from French to Kreyòl. All labels updated in real-time.

sidebar_menu_translation.details: All sidebar menu items translated when language changed
menu_items_translated: Tableau de bord → Tablo de bò

ticket_print_succursale_name.details: API /api/ticket/print/{id} includes SUCCURSALE label and name in HTML output

only_open_lotteries_visible.details: Nouvelle Vente page shows only 'Loteries Ouvertes' section with 2 open lotteries. Closed lotteries are filtered out.

vendeur_profile_succursale.details: API /api/vendeur/profile returns succursale object with name field

translation_files.details: All 4 translation files exist with complete vendeur keys

screenshots: .screenshots/vendeur_dashboard_ht.png - Dashboard in Kreyòl after language change
.screenshots/nouvelle_vente_page.png - New Sale page showing only open lotteries
